sections.paragraph: m. pl. Job 37:9 properly part. Pi. of the root זָרָה those that scatter, poetically used of the north winds, which scatter the clouds and bring settled cold (comp. رامسات and ذاريات scatterers, used of the winds, Sur. li. 1), and thus used of the north; Vulg. Arcturus; LXX. ἀκρωτήρια (fort. leg. ἀρκτῷα, ἀρκτοῦρος). Others regard this as the same as מַזָּרֹות Job 38:2.
